head_ref_note: ca4d9eb (D8 conservative framing) or descendant; D9 spec-only
selection_basis: Crypto-D8 (ca4d9eb) SELECT_FAMILY_FOR_CRYPTO_D9_SPEC: daily crash-candle / 1-day-drop reversion; POWER_OK on BTC unfiltered (81 @ -5%, 33 @ -7%, maxYr<=0.43, regime-diverse incl 2022)

2_market_timeframe.venue_data: Binance USDT daily UTC frozen data

3_core_hypothesis: A large one-day spot crypto selloff may create short-horizon mean reversion due to forced liquidation / panic selling / liquidity recovery. D8 proved enough raw event count but does NOT prove edge.

4_entry_rule.no_sma200_uptrend_filter: omitted in v1 because D8 proved an SMA200/uptrend filter starves BTC below the event-count floor (CODR-1 collapsed to 9 BTC events)
4_entry_rule.no_confirmation_filter: omitted in v1 because confirmation filters risk reducing BTC below the event-count floor
4_entry_rule.signal_while_in_position: ignore additional signals while a position is open

5_exit_rule.rule: exit at close of the 3rd bar after entry
5_exit_rule.consequence: if entry is at open_{t+1}, exit is close_{t+3}
5_exit_rule.data_end: if data ends before the 3rd close, mark as data_end (boundary artifact only)

6_risk_accounting.sizing: equal notional per trade for reporting

hard_gates: BTC top-3 removal remains positive after 0.30% friction
Stress friction 0.45% remains positive on combined
At least 2/3 symbols positive after 0.30% friction
No single year dominates >60% of net
OOS cannot be touched unless IS passes AND OOS protocol is committed

8_validation_ladder.Crypto-D13: OOS once only if IS passes
8_validation_ladder.then: entry/distribution significance, sequence risk, regime, multi-asset, walk-forward, friction, final decision

9_anti_overfit_rules: No switching to -7% or -10% unless new branch
No adding SMA/trend filter after results
10_failure_modes: Edge may be negative after friction
Crash events may cluster in one year
Daily open may gap against the entry
No confirmation filter may admit low-quality signals
If daily raw crash spec fails IS, next step should be NEEDS_4H_DATA_PROTOCOL or a new branch, not tuning
11_final_line: Crypto-D9 is a frozen strategy-spec step only; no crypto backtest, OOS, exchange API, paper trading, or live trading is authorized.
